text: In the first scene, standing before the glass-walled meeting room, I feel a sense of detachment and curiosity—an observer hesitating before entering a space of discussion and exchange. In the second scene, the vivid colors and the large letters "R+D" draw my attention to thoughts of innovation and discovery. The words on the screen evoke in me a contemplative mood, as if invited to pause and reflect deeply. I am aware of being in a place dedicated to thought, research, and the sharing of ideas, which feels both inspiring and slightly daunting.
